ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_shows" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TV show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the TV show */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the TV show */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the TV show */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the TV show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director of the TV show or movie */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer of the TV show or movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the TV show or movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode or movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearms" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the firearm */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the firearm */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the firearm */,
  "caliber" TEXT /* Caliber of the firearm */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the firearm */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the firearm */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the firearm was manufactured */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the firearm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessories" (
  "accessory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the accessory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accessory */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the accessory */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the accessory was manufactured */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the accessory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_actors" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the TV show */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number where the actor appears (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_characters" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number where the character appears (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_accessories" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm */,
  "accessory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessory */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the specific combination of the firearm and accessory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id", "accessory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tv_show_firearms" (
  "tv_show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TV show */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm */,
  "scene" INTEGER /* Scene or sequence number where the firearm was used */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the specific use of the firearm in the TV show or movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tv_show_id", "firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
